practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the stack actions
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right stack action for each job.
hints: Adding to a stack is push.
Removing from a stack is pop.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You matched the stack jobs to the correct actions.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck what push, pop, and peek each do.

blanks.label: Action for adding to the top
Action for looking at the top
